# Tasks: Test Feature - 4 Phases

**Purpose**: Test fixture for multi-task orchestration with 4 phases

## Phase 1: Initialize

**Goal**: Set up project structure

- [ ] T001: Create feature branch
- [ ] T002: Set up directory structure
- [ ] T003: Initialize configuration files
- [ ] T004: Set up CI/CD pipeline

## Phase 2: Implement

**Goal**: Implement core functionality

- [ ] T005: Implement main feature logic
- [ ] T006: Add unit tests
- [ ] T007: Add integration tests
- [ ] T008: Update documentation

## Phase 3: Review & Fix

**Goal**: Address code review feedback

- [ ] T009: Submit code for review
- [ ] T010: Address review comments
- [ ] T011: Run static analysis
- [ ] T012: Fix linting issues

## Phase 4: PR/CI/Merge

**Goal**: Complete PR and merge

- [ ] T013: Create pull request
- [ ] T014: Wait for CI checks to pass
- [ ] T015: Get approval from reviewers
- [ ] T016: Merge to main branch
